transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. We reviewed your account and have a good offer to help close it. Can we talk for a moment?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ravi, just to confirm — am I speaking with Ravi Gupta?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yeah. Yeah. I I can see.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, Ravi. So your account shows fifty thousand rupees pending on your DemoLender loan. I'm checking with the team on the best closure offer for your account — but that's exactly why I'm calling today. Can you tell me a little about what's been going on — why payments haven't been coming through?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I I said I can't say not see.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you say that again?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yeah. I I can share. Not a problem.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Ravi. So what's been going on — why have payments been on hold for a while?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No. You asked me a question. Right? Why are you pulling out my account details now?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your number is registered with your DemoLender loan account, Ravi. I'm just here to help find the best way to close this out for you. Nothing unusual — this is a standard follow-up on your account.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: So Ravi, your account has been unpaid for quite a while now. Can you help me understand what's been happening — is it a job situation, or something else going on?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Waiting for what, Ravi — are you between jobs right now, or waiting on some income to come in?
